item.title: Professional Send Bulk SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: Professional Send Bulk SMS [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Send Bulk SMS
(Chat & Messenging)
Looking for cost effective text messaging utility? Download Send Bulk SMS Software from www.sendbulksms.org which is easiest and quickest way to keep in touch with your friends, co-workers, business clients, relatives and family members to send personalized text messages, funny jokes and seasonal greetings on their cell phone from pc connected via with GSM mobile device without requiring any internet gateway. PC to mobile text messaging software is designed using delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk SMS broadcasting.

[read more]
item.description:
Professional Send Bulk SMS

Looking for cost effective text messaging utility? Download Send Bulk SMS Software from www.sendbulksms.org which is easiest and quickest way to keep in touch with your friends, co-workers, business clients, relatives and family members to send personalized text messages, funny jokes and seasonal greetings on their cell phone from pc connected via with GSM mobile device without requiring any internet gateway. PC to mobile text messaging software is designed using delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk SMS broadcasting.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Professional Send Bulk SMS
(Chat & Messenging)
Looking for cost effective text messaging utility? Download Send Bulk SMS Software from www.sendbulksms.org which is easiest and quickest way to keep in touch with your friends, co-workers, business clients, relatives and family members to send personalized text messages, funny jokes and seasonal greetings on their cell phone from pc connected via with GSM mobile device without requiring any internet gateway. PC to mobile text messaging software is designed using delay delivery feature to maintain load of bulk SMS broadcasting.

[read more]

item.title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: Converseen [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: faster
item.itunes:summary:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:
[read more]
item.description:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]

[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

item.content:encoded:
Converseen
(Graphic Apps)
[b]Converseen[/b] is a free cross-platform batch image processor for [b]Windows[b], Linux, macOS, FreeBSD[/b], and other operating systems. It allows you to [b]convert, resize, rotate, and flip[/b] an infinite number of images with a single mouse click. Moreover, [b]Converseen[/b] can convert an entire [b]PDF document into a set of images[/b] with your preferred characteristics. You can choose from over [b]100+ formats[/b], set the size, resolution, and the filename.
Thanks to [b]ImageMagick[/b], the powerful image manipulation library, [b]Converseen[/b] can handle more than [b]100 image formats[/b], including [b]DPX, EXR, GIF, JPEG, JPEG-2000, PNG, SVG, TIFF, WebP, HEIC/HEIF[/b], and many others. [b]Converseen[/b] is designed to be user-friendly, fast, practical, and best of all, it’s available for free!

[b]With Converseen you can[/b]:
- Carry out a single or a multiple conversion.
- Resize one or multiple images.
- Compress images for your web pages.
- Rotate and flip images.
- Rename a set of images using a progressive number or a prefix/suffix.
- Selecting a resampling filter to resize images.
- Convert an entire PDF to a bunch of images
- Extract an image from a Windows icon file (*ico)

If you appreciate this work and would like to support the project, you are welcome to donate money via Paypal: [url]https://www.paypal.com/cgi-bin/webscr?cmd=_s-xclick&hosted_button_id=HQA6TBT5354FC[/url]

[b]Converseen[/b] is available for the following platforms:
[li][b]Archlinux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Chakra Linux[/b][/li]
[li][b]Fedora[/b][/li]
[li][b]Mageia[/b][/li]
[li][b]Opensuse[/b][/li]
[li][b]Ubuntu[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]Windows XP/Vista/7[/b][/li]
[li][b]FreeBSD[/b][/li]

[b]Converseen[/b] is also available on [b]Snapcraft[/b], as [b]AppImage[/b] and ad [b]Flatpak[/b]:

item.title: Restore Memory Card Files Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Memory Card Files Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Memory Card Files Software
(Utilities)
Restore Memory Card Files Software restore removed files from compact flash memory card in just few clicks of mouse with advanced GUI interface so that user can easily operate software without acquiring any special skill. Micro SD cards folders recovery application regains missing files from SD card even if "Drive Not Formatted" error message is displayed while accessing portable memory card on desktop and laptop PC.

[read more]
item.description:
Restore Memory Card Files Software
(Utilities)
Restore Memory Card Files Software restore removed files from compact flash memory card in just few clicks of mouse with advanced GUI interface so that user can easily operate software without acquiring any special skill. Micro SD cards folders recovery application regains missing files from SD card even if "Drive Not Formatted" error message is displayed while accessing portable memory card on desktop and laptop PC.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Restore Memory Card Files Software
(Utilities)
Restore Memory Card Files Software restore removed files from compact flash memory card in just few clicks of mouse with advanced GUI interface so that user can easily operate software without acquiring any special skill. Micro SD cards folders recovery application regains missing files from SD card even if "Drive Not Formatted" error message is displayed while accessing portable memory card on desktop and laptop PC.

[read more]

item.title: Sokoban SG [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:title: Sokoban SG [Tactics & Strategy]
item.itunes:author: green7
item.itunes:summary:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* 5 Level Set File Formats; Sokoban (txt, sok, lvl, LP0), XSokoban (xsb)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:
* Adjustable dockwidgets w/ selectable layouts
* Transparent colors/tiles/fonts/skins

Languages:
* English, French, Russian
[read more]
item.description:
Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export
* 5 Level Set File Formats; Sokoban (txt, sok, lvl, LP0), XSokoban (xsb)
* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:
* Adjustable dockwidgets w/ selectable layouts
* Transparent colors/tiles/fonts/skins

Languages:

Sokoban SG
(Tactics & Strategy)
The classic Japanese game of Soko-Ban, features you as a warehouse keeper with an objective to efficiently push crates onto goals without trapping yourself. But watch your step! Dynamic mazes may develop that require careful forethought.
This version features an advanced user interface providing a variety of tools for developing and solving level sets:

* Level Limits: 50x50, 30000 moves
* Level Set Development Suite; Play/Import/Edit/Export

* Local/Remote Level Manager (sshfs, NFS, etc)
* Pathfind Technique Solver
* In-Play Position Optimizer
* Solution Manager; Import/Edit/Convert/Export

Customizable User Interface:

item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Send Bulk SMS Android Mac
(Chat & Messenging)
Send Bulk SMS Android Mac software easily downloaded from website www.sendbulksms.org which enables users to send text messages to large group of selected contact numbers within fraction of seconds. Bulk SMS program supports Macintosh platform for effective working of utility in messaging purposes across worldwide location.

item.title: Digital Camera Photos Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Photos Restore [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: restoredeleted
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Photos Restore
(Utilities)
Use perfectly designed Digital Camera Photos Restore program for rescuing missing images lost due to human error, accidental deletion, worm attacks, mismanagement of camera memory and many more reasons of data loss. Camera data recovery software helps in getting back lost snapshots instantly. Technically advanced digital photo reviving utility has inbuilt disk scanning technique to search and restore all lost snapshots from your digital camera.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Camera Photos Restore
(Utilities)
Use perfectly designed Digital Camera Photos Restore program for rescuing missing images lost due to human error, accidental deletion, worm attacks, mismanagement of camera memory and many more reasons of data loss. Camera data recovery software helps in getting back lost snapshots instantly. Technically advanced digital photo reviving utility has inbuilt disk scanning technique to search and restore all lost snapshots from your digital camera.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Camera Photos Restore
(Utilities)
Use perfectly designed Digital Camera Photos Restore program for rescuing missing images lost due to human error, accidental deletion, worm attacks, mismanagement of camera memory and many more reasons of data loss. Camera data recovery software helps in getting back lost snapshots instantly. Technically advanced digital photo reviving utility has inbuilt disk scanning technique to search and restore all lost snapshots from your digital camera.

[read more]

item.title: Ping Monitor [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Ping Monitor [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Exploring the Ping Monitor Magical Module by revWhiteShadow
Unveiling the Magic with "su -c pm" Terminal Command

In the world of innovative technology, RevWhiteShadow introduces a magical module known as the Ping Monitor, transforming the way users interact with their devices. Executed through the terminal command "su -c pm," this module promises a seamless and enchanting experience, particularly for those interested in Ping golf equipment, including the highly sought-after Ping G425 irons and drivers.

Ping G425 Irons: A Swing into Precision

Ping G425 irons have been a game-changer for golf enthusiasts, offering a perfect blend of forgiveness and distance. With the Ping Monitor Magical Module, users can now monitor their golfing equipment in real-time, ensuring optimal performance and tracking relevant metrics. The module provides insights into the G425 irons, ensuring that every swing is as precise as possible.

Ping G425 Driver: Maximizing Performance

For those who have embraced the Ping G425 driver or the G425 Max driver, the Ping Monitor module takes performance monitoring to the next level. Through the "su -c pm" command, users gain access to real-time data, allowing them to fine-tune their driver settings for maximum distance and accuracy on the golf course.

Ping G430 Series: Expanding Possibilities

The Ping G430 irons and drivers are also under the watchful eye of the Ping Monitor Magical Module. Golf enthusiasts can delve into the intricacies of their G430 equipment, exploring customized tweaks and optimizations for an enhanced golfing experience.

Comprehensive Ping Monitoring

Beyond specific models, the Ping Monitor module caters to a wide array of Ping golf equipment. Whether it's the G410 driver, the Hoofer Lite bag, the G425 hybrid, or the iconic Ping putters, users can monitor and tweak settings to align with their unique preferences.

The Future of Ping Golf Clubs: Ping Irons 2023

As golf technology evolves, so does the Ping Monitor module. Anticipate updates and optimizations tailored for upcoming releases, including the highly anticipated Ping irons 2023.

Unlocking Special Features: SFT Driver and More

The Ping G425 SFT driver, known for its draw bias, receives special attention from the Ping Monitor module. Unlock unique features tailored for specific Ping equipment, ensuring that every golfer finds the perfect setup for their game.

Seamless Integration with Ping Accessories

Ping hats, wedges, hybrids, and the popular Ping Hoofer 14 bag—all seamlessly integrated into the Ping Monitor Magical Module. Customize and monitor your entire Ping golf set with ease, optimizing each piece of equipment for peak performance.

Conclusion: Elevating the Ping Golfing Experience

RevWhiteShadow's Ping Monitor Magical Module, initiated with "su -c pm" in the terminal, is a testament to the fusion of technology and sports. Golf enthusiasts can now unlock the full potential of their Ping equipment, ensuring that every swing is backed by precision, data, and a touch of magic. As we look forward to the evolving landscape of Ping golf clubs, the Ping Monitor module stands ready to enchant users with its continuous updates and tailored optimizations.
[read more]
item.description:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Exploring the Ping Monitor Magical Module by revWhiteShadow
Unveiling the Magic with "su -c pm" Terminal Command

In the world of innovative technology, RevWhiteShadow introduces a magical module known as the Ping Monitor, transforming the way users interact with their devices. Executed through the terminal command "su -c pm," this module promises a seamless and enchanting experience, particularly for those interested in Ping golf equipment, including the highly sought-after Ping G425 irons and drivers.

Ping G425 Irons: A Swing into Precision

Ping G425 irons have been a game-changer for golf enthusiasts, offering a perfect blend of forgiveness and distance. With the Ping Monitor Magical Module, users can now monitor their golfing equipment in real-time, ensuring optimal performance and tracking relevant metrics. The module provides insights into the G425 irons, ensuring that every swing is as precise as possible.

Ping G425 Driver: Maximizing Performance

For those who have embraced the Ping G425 driver or the G425 Max driver, the Ping Monitor module takes performance monitoring to the next level. Through the "su -c pm" command, users gain access to real-time data, allowing them to fine-tune their driver settings for maximum distance and accuracy on the golf course.

Ping G430 Series: Expanding Possibilities

The Ping G430 irons and drivers are also under the watchful eye of the Ping Monitor Magical Module. Golf enthusiasts can delve into the intricacies of their G430 equipment, exploring customized tweaks and optimizations for an enhanced golfing experience.

Comprehensive Ping Monitoring

Beyond specific models, the Ping Monitor module caters to a wide array of Ping golf equipment. Whether it's the G410 driver, the Hoofer Lite bag, the G425 hybrid, or the iconic Ping putters, users can monitor and tweak settings to align with their unique preferences.

The Future of Ping Golf Clubs: Ping Irons 2023

As golf technology evolves, so does the Ping Monitor module. Anticipate updates and optimizations tailored for upcoming releases, including the highly anticipated Ping irons 2023.

Unlocking Special Features: SFT Driver and More

The Ping G425 SFT driver, known for its draw bias, receives special attention from the Ping Monitor module. Unlock unique features tailored for specific Ping equipment, ensuring that every golfer finds the perfect setup for their game.

Seamless Integration with Ping Accessories

Ping hats, wedges, hybrids, and the popular Ping Hoofer 14 bag—all seamlessly integrated into the Ping Monitor Magical Module. Customize and monitor your entire Ping golf set with ease, optimizing each piece of equipment for peak performance.

Conclusion: Elevating the Ping Golfing Experience

RevWhiteShadow's Ping Monitor Magical Module, initiated with "su -c pm" in the terminal, is a testament to the fusion of technology and sports. Golf enthusiasts can now unlock the full potential of their Ping equipment, ensuring that every swing is backed by precision, data, and a touch of magic. As we look forward to the evolving landscape of Ping golf clubs, the Ping Monitor module stands ready to enchant users with its continuous updates and tailored optimizations.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Exploring the Ping Monitor Magical Module by revWhiteShadow
Unveiling the Magic with "su -c pm" Terminal Command

In the world of innovative technology, RevWhiteShadow introduces a magical module known as the Ping Monitor, transforming the way users interact with their devices. Executed through the terminal command "su -c pm," this module promises a seamless and enchanting experience, particularly for those interested in Ping golf equipment, including the highly sought-after Ping G425 irons and drivers.

Ping G425 Irons: A Swing into Precision

Ping G425 irons have been a game-changer for golf enthusiasts, offering a perfect blend of forgiveness and distance. With the Ping Monitor Magical Module, users can now monitor their golfing equipment in real-time, ensuring optimal performance and tracking relevant metrics. The module provides insights into the G425 irons, ensuring that every swing is as precise as possible.

Ping G425 Driver: Maximizing Performance

For those who have embraced the Ping G425 driver or the G425 Max driver, the Ping Monitor module takes performance monitoring to the next level. Through the "su -c pm" command, users gain access to real-time data, allowing them to fine-tune their driver settings for maximum distance and accuracy on the golf course.

Ping G430 Series: Expanding Possibilities

The Ping G430 irons and drivers are also under the watchful eye of the Ping Monitor Magical Module. Golf enthusiasts can delve into the intricacies of their G430 equipment, exploring customized tweaks and optimizations for an enhanced golfing experience.

Comprehensive Ping Monitoring

Beyond specific models, the Ping Monitor module caters to a wide array of Ping golf equipment. Whether it's the G410 driver, the Hoofer Lite bag, the G425 hybrid, or the iconic Ping putters, users can monitor and tweak settings to align with their unique preferences.

The Future of Ping Golf Clubs: Ping Irons 2023

As golf technology evolves, so does the Ping Monitor module. Anticipate updates and optimizations tailored for upcoming releases, including the highly anticipated Ping irons 2023.

Unlocking Special Features: SFT Driver and More

The Ping G425 SFT driver, known for its draw bias, receives special attention from the Ping Monitor module. Unlock unique features tailored for specific Ping equipment, ensuring that every golfer finds the perfect setup for their game.

Seamless Integration with Ping Accessories

Ping hats, wedges, hybrids, and the popular Ping Hoofer 14 bag—all seamlessly integrated into the Ping Monitor Magical Module. Customize and monitor your entire Ping golf set with ease, optimizing each piece of equipment for peak performance.

Conclusion: Elevating the Ping Golfing Experience

RevWhiteShadow's Ping Monitor Magical Module, initiated with "su -c pm" in the terminal, is a testament to the fusion of technology and sports. Golf enthusiasts can now unlock the full potential of their Ping equipment, ensuring that every swing is backed by precision, data, and a touch of magic. As we look forward to the evolving landscape of Ping golf clubs, the Ping Monitor module stands ready to enchant users with its continuous updates and tailored optimizations.
[read more]

item.title: Ping Monitor [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Ping Monitor [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
# Aurthor : revWhiteShadow
# Build Date : 19-12-2023
# Last Modify : Null
# Licence : GPL V3
[url=https://t.me/godTspeed] Telegram]
---

🚀 **PING MONITOR BY @revWhiteShadow** 🚀

---

👋 **Hello, Linux Enthusiasts!**

Are you curious about the performance of your network connection? Want a quick and colorful way to monitor your ping? Look no further! I present to you the **PING MONITOR** script, crafted by the talented @revWhiteShadow.

📝 **Usage Instructions:**

1. **Download the Script:**
- Clone or download the script from the repository.

2. **Set Permissions:**
- Make the script executable using the following command:
```
chmod +x pm
```

3. **Run the Script:**
- Execute the script using the following command:
```
./pm
```

4. **Enjoy the Colorful Output:**
- The script will perform 15 ping tests to google.com and display the results with colorful status indicators.

5. **Desktop Notifications:**
- Desktop notifications will keep you informed of the overall ping status and individual ping results.

6. **Customization (Optional):**
- Feel free to customize the script according to your preferences, adjust color codes, or modify the ping target.

7. **Stay Notified:**
- The script utilizes `notify-send` for desktop notifications, keeping you informed about the overall and individual ping statuses.

🌐 **Compatibility:**
- The script is designed for Linux environments and provides a quick and visual way to assess your network's responsiveness.

🎨 **Color Code Legend:**
- **Red:** Server not responding.
- **Green:** Super fast ping (less than 30ms).
- **Violet:** Moderate ping (30ms - 100ms).
- **Red:** High ping (100ms - 120ms).
- **Red:** Super high ping (more than 120ms).

🔄 **Repeat as Needed:**
- Feel free to run the script as often as you like to monitor changes in your network's performance.

🙏 **Acknowledgments:**
- Special thanks to @revWhiteShadow for the inspiration and guidance in creating this handy ping monitoring script.

🔗 **Repository Link:**
- [Ping Monitor Script](https://bestmagiskmodule.github.io/2023/12/19/Ping-Monitor-magical-module.html)

🔍 **Explore, Monitor, and Enjoy the Insights!**

---


[read more]
item.description:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
# Aurthor : revWhiteShadow
# Build Date : 19-12-2023
# Last Modify : Null
# Licence : GPL V3
[url=https://t.me/godTspeed] Telegram]
---

🚀 **PING MONITOR BY @revWhiteShadow** 🚀

---

👋 **Hello, Linux Enthusiasts!**

Are you curious about the performance of your network connection? Want a quick and colorful way to monitor your ping? Look no further! I present to you the **PING MONITOR** script, crafted by the talented @revWhiteShadow.

📝 **Usage Instructions:**

1. **Download the Script:**
- Clone or download the script from the repository.

2. **Set Permissions:**
- Make the script executable using the following command:
```
chmod +x pm
```

3. **Run the Script:**
- Execute the script using the following command:
```
./pm
```

4. **Enjoy the Colorful Output:**
- The script will perform 15 ping tests to google.com and display the results with colorful status indicators.

5. **Desktop Notifications:**
- Desktop notifications will keep you informed of the overall ping status and individual ping results.

6. **Customization (Optional):**
- Feel free to customize the script according to your preferences, adjust color codes, or modify the ping target.

7. **Stay Notified:**
- The script utilizes `notify-send` for desktop notifications, keeping you informed about the overall and individual ping statuses.

🌐 **Compatibility:**
- The script is designed for Linux environments and provides a quick and visual way to assess your network's responsiveness.

🎨 **Color Code Legend:**
- **Red:** Server not responding.
- **Green:** Super fast ping (less than 30ms).
- **Violet:** Moderate ping (30ms - 100ms).
- **Red:** High ping (100ms - 120ms).
- **Red:** Super high ping (more than 120ms).

🔄 **Repeat as Needed:**
- Feel free to run the script as often as you like to monitor changes in your network's performance.

🙏 **Acknowledgments:**
- Special thanks to @revWhiteShadow for the inspiration and guidance in creating this handy ping monitoring script.

🔗 **Repository Link:**
- [Ping Monitor Script](https://bestmagiskmodule.github.io/2023/12/19/Ping-Monitor-magical-module.html)

🔍 **Explore, Monitor, and Enjoy the Insights!**

---


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Ping Monitor
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
# Aurthor : revWhiteShadow
# Build Date : 19-12-2023
# Last Modify : Null
# Licence : GPL V3
[url=https://t.me/godTspeed] Telegram]
---

🚀 **PING MONITOR BY @revWhiteShadow** 🚀

---

👋 **Hello, Linux Enthusiasts!**

Are you curious about the performance of your network connection? Want a quick and colorful way to monitor your ping? Look no further! I present to you the **PING MONITOR** script, crafted by the talented @revWhiteShadow.

📝 **Usage Instructions:**

1. **Download the Script:**
- Clone or download the script from the repository.

2. **Set Permissions:**
- Make the script executable using the following command:
```
chmod +x pm
```

3. **Run the Script:**
- Execute the script using the following command:
```
./pm
```

4. **Enjoy the Colorful Output:**
- The script will perform 15 ping tests to google.com and display the results with colorful status indicators.

5. **Desktop Notifications:**
- Desktop notifications will keep you informed of the overall ping status and individual ping results.

6. **Customization (Optional):**
- Feel free to customize the script according to your preferences, adjust color codes, or modify the ping target.

7. **Stay Notified:**
- The script utilizes `notify-send` for desktop notifications, keeping you informed about the overall and individual ping statuses.

🌐 **Compatibility:**
- The script is designed for Linux environments and provides a quick and visual way to assess your network's responsiveness.

🎨 **Color Code Legend:**
- **Red:** Server not responding.
- **Green:** Super fast ping (less than 30ms).
- **Violet:** Moderate ping (30ms - 100ms).
- **Red:** High ping (100ms - 120ms).
- **Red:** Super high ping (more than 120ms).

🔄 **Repeat as Needed:**
- Feel free to run the script as often as you like to monitor changes in your network's performance.

🙏 **Acknowledgments:**
- Special thanks to @revWhiteShadow for the inspiration and guidance in creating this handy ping monitoring script.

🔗 **Repository Link:**
- [Ping Monitor Script](https://bestmagiskmodule.github.io/2023/12/19/Ping-Monitor-magical-module.html)

🔍 **Explore, Monitor, and Enjoy the Insights!**

---

item.itunes:title: Send Bulk SMS BlackBerry [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: sendbulksms
item.itunes:summary:
Send Bulk SMS BlackBerry
(Chat & Messenging)
Broadcast countless text messages from PC to mobile phones using comprehensive Send Bulk SMS BlackBerry software. Download sms delivery program from www.sendbulksms.org to successfully transfer multiple text chat messages from your personal computer system connected with BlackBerry mobiles. Group message transferring application easily eliminates duplicate contact numbers when sending bulk text messages to group of contact list. Sms broadcasting application provides instant delay delivery report to control the load of sent bulk messages.

item.itunes:summary:
Send Bulk SMS from Mobile
(Chat & Messenging)
Send Bulk SMS from Mobile to connect with global contact over worldwide? Visit www.sendbulksms.org that introduces text transferring software to forward unlimited sms composed in unicode language from your computer. Most reliable sms sending application helps technical as well as non technical users to forward boundless promotional text from desktop connected with GSM technology based mobile phones. Technically proved group sms forwarding software eliminates duplicate entries while delivering infinite texts with instant delay delivery report.
